description_zh: 开前不圆唇元音，口张大，舌位最低，类似中文
description_en: Open front unrounded vowel; mouth wide open, tongue lowest position, similar to English 'ah'
mouth_shape_note: 嘴巴大张，舌头平放，嘴唇不圆

description_zh: 闭前不圆唇元音，嘴角向两边拉开，类似中文
description_en: Close-mid front unrounded vowel; lips spread, similar to English 'ay' but shorter
similar_sound_en: Similar to 'ay' in 'say' but shorter and without glide

description_zh: 闭前不圆唇元音，嘴角紧拉，类似中文
description_en: Close front unrounded vowel; lips tightly spread
mouth_shape_note: 嘴角用力向两侧拉，舌尖抵下齿

description_zh: 闭中后圆唇元音，嘴唇圆而略突出
description_en: Close-mid back rounded vowel; lips rounded and slightly protruded
mouth_shape_note: 嘴唇圆成小圈，略向前突出
similar_sound_en: Similar to 'o' in 'go' but shorter and purer

description_zh: 闭后圆唇元音，嘴唇紧圆前突，类似中文
description_en: Close back rounded vowel; lips tightly rounded and protruded
mouth_shape_note: 嘴唇紧圆前突，如吹口哨

description_zh: 鼻化开前不圆唇元音，气流从口鼻同时出，类似
description_en: Nasal open-mid front unrounded vowel; air flows through nose and mouth simultaneously
mouth_shape_note: 嘴巴半张，软腭下降让气流经鼻腔
similar_sound_en: No English equivalent; like 'an' in 'can't' (British) but without final consonant

description_en: Uvular fricative; the iconic French 'r', produced deep in the throat
mouth_shape_note: 舌根后缩接近小舌，气流摩擦通过
similar_sound_zh: 无对应，类似轻咳或漱口声
similar_sound_en: No English equivalent; similar to a gentle gargling or clearing throat sound

description_zh: 闭前圆唇元音，说/i/的同时圆唇，法语特有
description_en: Close front rounded vowel; say /i/ while rounding lips; unique to French
mouth_shape_note: 舌位如/i/但嘴唇圆如/u/，法语的标志音
similar_sound_en: No English equivalent; say 'ee' then round your lips tightly
